headline: Chipotle adds free offer for customers amid rising prices
summary: Chipotle, like many of its peers in the fast-food industry, is experimenting with new tactics to attract price-conscious customers. As it battles slow sales growth, it is offering $2 million worth of freebies to two key groups of customers. In the first quarter of 2026, Chipotle’s comparable ...

summary: The return of risk-on sentiment helped push the fast-casual stock higher.
